allow_instructions: Allow git push when the user or sprint closure protocol explicitly requests pushing commits to origin.
Allow gh pr create and gh pr view for pull request workflows when requested.
Allow pnpm install, pnpm test, pnpm typecheck, and pnpm build for monorepo quality gates.
Allow node and npm scripts for repo automation, mobile evidence, and ecosystem checks.
Never run sudo in Cursor — elevated macOS steps use Terminal.app per .baseline/operator-environment.local.json.
